question: 核查以R004212为线索的拆分报销异常,返回异常ID和记录ID集合
policy_questions: What constitutes split reimbursement under Article 11?
What are the higher approval tier thresholds from Authorization Management?
data_questions: Are there other travel_lodging records by E0009 within 7 days of R004212?
Does the combined amount reach a higher approval tier?
evidence_requirements: Expense records for E0009 travel_lodging within 2025-04-03 to 2025-04-17
Approval records for all involved records
execution_steps: Search related records by same employee, same expense_type, within 7-day window
Calculate combined amount and determine applicable approval tier
Compare individual tier vs combined tier to identify split avoidance
complexity_reasons: Threshold comparison (7-day window, amount tier boundary)
subagent_plan: none - compact main agent sufficient for single-rule batch investigation
stopping_conditions: All travel_lodging records for E0009 within 7-day window identified
Combined amount compared to authorization thresholds
